name: Popcorn Balls
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Keep the popped popcorn warm in a 200°F (93°C) oven while preparing the coating.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, stir together sugar, corn syrup, water, butter (or margarine), and salt.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
4. Continue cooking without stirring until the temperature reaches 270°F (132°C) on a candy thermometer or until a small amount dropped into very cold water separates into threads that are hard but not brittle. Remove from heat.
5. Add vanilla and stir just enough to mix through the hot syrup.
6. Slowly pour over the popped popcorn, stirring to coat every kernel.
7. Cool slightly so it's safe to handle.
8. With greased hands, shape the popcorn into balls.
